title: Trump ceasefire extension catches markets off-guard — posted 10 min after close
snippet: CBS highlights the market timing of Trump's Truth Social post: exactly 10 minutes after the 4pm ET market close. S&P/Nasdaq/Dow had all closed down ~0.6% on Iran uncertainty. After-hours oil fell: WTI -1.1% to $88.60, Brent -0.6% to $94.89. Speculation about deliberate timing to avoid intraday volatility.
tag_reason: 트럼프의 발표 타이밍(장 마감 10분 후)과 시장 영향에 대한 독자적 분석. 의도적 타이밍 가능성을 제기한 신규 관점.
